leagueBriefing: Conference tournament season shifted into high gear as Gonzaga secured its 29th straight WCC title game appearance, while Santa Clara pulled off a major upset to burst the bubble of Saint Mary's.

games.headline: Ike dominates as Gonzaga reaches 29th straight WCC title game
games.brief: Gonzaga continued its remarkable run of WCC dominance, securing a spot in the conference championship game for nearly the 30th consecutive year. Graham Ike was the undisputed star, recording a massive double-double and serving as the only Bulldog to reach double figures in scoring. The Zags' defense set the tone early, smothering the Beavers and holding them to a dismal shooting performance in the first half to ensure Gonzaga's final WCC tournament run ends on a high note before they jump to the Pac-12.
bullets: Graham Ike finished with 24 points and 11 rebounds, marking his 45th career double-double.
Gonzaga outscored Oregon State 16-0 on the fast break and 38-24 in the paint.
The Bulldogs' defense forced 10-second and shot-clock violations during a decisive 15-2 first-half run.
Oregon State missed its first nine shots of the game and shot just 28.6% in the opening half.
This marks Gonzaga's final WCC tournament before joining the Pac-12 next season.
games.context: Gonzaga moves to the championship game with a 29-3 record, maintaining their status as a projected high seed in the NCAA Tournament.

highlights.title: Oregon State Beavers vs. Gonzaga Bulldogs | WCC MBB Tournament Highlights | ESPN College Basketball

games.headline: Santa Clara stuns Saint Mary's to reach first WCC final since 2007
games.brief: Santa Clara likely punched their ticket to the Big Dance with a thrilling upset over No. 21 Saint Mary's. In a game that featured 14 lead changes, Sash Gavalyugov delivered the dagger with a late three-pointer that silenced the Gaels. The win is a massive milestone for coach Herb Sendek, marking his 600th career victory and breaking a four-year streak of Gonzaga-Saint Mary's championship matchups. While the Gaels should still be safe for an at-large bid, the Broncos have transformed from bubble team to title contenders.
bullets: Sash Gavalyugov scored 23 points, including the go-ahead 3-pointer with 12.1 seconds remaining.
Coach Herb Sendek earned his 600th career coaching victory with the upset win.
This is the first time since 2021 that the WCC final will not feature both Gonzaga and Saint Mary's.
Paulius Murauskas led the Gaels with 26 points in the losing effort.
Santa Clara entered the game ranked No. 42 in the NCAA NET rankings, significantly boosting their tournament resume.
games.context: Santa Clara reaches its first WCC final in 19 years and likely secures an NCAA Tournament berth.

games.headline: Monmouth shuts down Campbell to advance to CAA championship
games.brief: Monmouth used a balanced attack and a strong second half to pull away from Campbell and secure a spot in the CAA title game. Kavion McClain took over after the break, scoring 14 of his 19 points to keep the Fighting Camels at arm's length. After Campbell narrowed the lead early in the second half, Monmouth responded with a 7-0 run that effectively iced the game, moving the Hawks one win away from an automatic NCAA Tournament bid.
bullets: Kavion McClain led all Hawks with 19 points, including 14 in the second half.
Jason Rivera-Torres contributed 17 points, 7 rebounds, and 3 steals.
Monmouth outscored Campbell 44-40 in the second half to maintain their lead.
Jeremiah Johnson scored 21 points for the ninth-seeded Fighting Camels in the loss.
Monmouth will face Hofstra in the championship game on Tuesday.
games.context: Monmouth advances to the CAA final for a chance at an automatic NCAA Tournament berth.

games.headline: Money Williams erupts for career-high 40 points in Big Sky thriller
games.brief: Montana's Money Williams lived up to his name on Monday night, delivering one of the most dominant individual performances of the season to lead the Grizzlies past Northern Colorado. Williams dropped a career-high 40 points, including 18 free throws, to fend off a late charge from the Bears. Despite 29 points from Quinn Denker, Montana's massive 17-point halftime lead proved to be too much for Northern Colorado to overcome in a high-scoring Big Sky quarterfinal.
bullets: Money Williams scored 40 points on 10-of-21 shooting and 18-of-19 from the free-throw line.
Montana built a commanding 49-32 lead by halftime.
Quinn Denker led Northern Colorado with 29 points and 8 assists.
The Grizzlies advance to face top-seeded Portland State in the semifinals.
Brock Wisne recorded a double-double for the Bears with 15 points and 11 rebounds.
games.context: Montana advances to the Big Sky semifinals behind a historic scoring performance.

games.headline: Edmead’s overtime dagger sends Hofstra to CAA final
games.brief: In a classic conference tournament nail-biter, Hofstra outlasted Towson in overtime thanks to the heroics of Preston Edmead. Towson's Tyler Tejada was a force all night with 29 points and forced overtime with late free throws, but Edmead answered back in the extra period. His two clutch three-pointers in overtime—including the go-ahead bucket with just three seconds left—punched Hofstra's ticket to the championship game and kept their NCAA dreams alive.
bullets: Preston Edmead scored 22 points, including the game-winning 3-pointer with three seconds left in OT.
Tyler Tejada scored a game-high 29 points for Towson in the loss.
Cruz Davis scored 16 of his 18 points in the second half for the Pride.
Hofstra outscored Towson 13-10 in the overtime period.
The Pride will face Monmouth in the CAA championship game.
games.context: Hofstra survives an upset bid to reach the CAA title game against Monmouth.

games.headline: Muttilib’s hot shooting leads Grambling to blowout win over Delta Devils
games.brief: Grambling left no room for doubt in their SWAC tournament opener, crushing Mississippi Valley State behind a 22-point effort from Jamil Muttilib. The Tigers took the lead midway through the first half and never looked back, using a barrage of three-pointers to build a double-digit halftime cushion. While Michael James played a valiant game for the Delta Devils, Grambling's superior depth and defensive pressure were too much for a Mississippi Valley State team that finished the year with 30 losses.
bullets: Jamil Muttilib scored 22 points, hitting 5-of-8 shots from beyond the arc.
Grambling led 34-19 at halftime and led for the final 29 minutes of the game.
Michael James led all scorers with 23 points for Mississippi Valley State.
Derrius Ward added 15 points and a game-high 7 assists for the Tigers.
Grambling advances to face Jackson State in the second round.
games.context: Grambling advances in the SWAC tournament while Mississippi Valley State's season comes to an end.

games.headline: Brankovic leads UTRGV past Nicholls into Southland semis
games.brief: UT Rio Grande Valley used a commanding first-half performance to cruise past Nicholls and secure a spot in the Southland Conference semifinals. Filip Brankovic led a balanced Vaqueros offense that saw multiple players catch fire from deep. Once UTRGV took the lead halfway through the first period, they never trailed again, effectively shutting down Trae English and the Colonels' offense to set up a high-stakes semifinal matchup with McNeese.
bullets: Filip Brankovic paced the Vaqueros with 21 points and 5 rebounds.
Koree Cotton added 18 points, including four 3-pointers.
UTRGV led 44-32 at the half and maintained a double-digit lead for most of the second period.
Trae English led Nicholls with 17 points in the losing effort.
The Vaqueros will face second-seeded McNeese on Tuesday.
games.context: UTRGV moves one step closer to a Southland title and an NCAA Tournament bid.

games.headline: Detroit Mercy rallies past Robert Morris to reach Horizon title game
games.brief: Detroit Mercy is headed to the Horizon League championship game after a gritty second-half comeback against Robert Morris. Trailing at the break, the Titans leaned on Orlando Lovejoy and a spark from the bench by Lance Stone to outscore the Colonials by nine in the final period. The win sets up a championship clash with top-seeded Wright State, where the Titans will look to complete their improbable run to the NCAA Tournament.
bullets: Orlando Lovejoy scored 21 points and dished out 6 assists to lead the Titans.
Lance Stone provided a major boost with 16 points off the bench.
Detroit Mercy outscored Robert Morris 37-28 in the second half to secure the win.
DeSean Goode led the Colonials with 14 points and 10 rebounds.
The Titans advance to face Wright State for the automatic bid on Tuesday.
games.context: Detroit Mercy moves to within one win of an automatic NCAA Tournament berth.

games.headline: Hamilton IV’s career night fuels Eastern Washington over Weber State
games.brief: Eastern Washington survived a late-game rally from Weber State to advance in the Big Sky Tournament, powered by a career-high 25 points from Alton Hamilton IV. The Eagles looked to be in total control after a massive 16-0 run in the first half, but they had to withstand a 27-point barrage from Tijan Saine Jr. in the second half. Isaiah Moses came up huge in the final minute with a clutch three-point play to ice the game and keep the Eagles' season alive.
bullets: Alton Hamilton IV scored a career-high 25 points on 8-of-10 shooting.
Isaiah Moses added 22 points and 8 assists, including a critical late three-point play.
Eastern Washington led by 14 points at halftime after a 16-0 first-half run.
Tijan Saine Jr. led all scorers with 27 points for Weber State.
The Eagles advance to face Idaho in the Big Sky semifinals.
games.context: Eastern Washington moves into the Big Sky semifinals to face the team that recently ended their win streak.
